ggsegMars 1.0.0
  • Reference
  • Changelog

MarsAtlas Cortical Parcellation

Source: R/data.R
marsatlas_cortical.Rd

Cortical parcellation based on macroanatomical information from Auzias et al. (2016), with 41 regions per hemisphere. Contains 2D polygon geometry for ggseg::geom_brain() and 3D vertex indices for ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

Usage

data(marsatlas_cortical)

Format

A ggseg.formats::ggseg_atlas object (cortical).

References

Auzias G, Coulon O, Brovelli A (2016). MarsAtlas: A cortical parcellation atlas for functional mapping. doi:10.1002/hbm.23121

See also

Other ggseg_atlases: marsatlas_subcortical

Examples

data(marsatlas_cortical)
marsatlas_cortical
#> 
#> ── marsatlas_cortical ggseg atlas ──────────────────────────────────────────────
#> Type: cortical
#> Regions: 43
#> Hemispheres: left, right
#> Views: lateral, medial
#> Palette: ✔
#> Rendering: ✔ ggseg
#> ✔ ggseg3d (vertices)
#> ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> # A tibble: 87 × 3
#>    hemi  region                                                   label         
#>    <chr> <chr>                                                    <chr>         
#>  1 left  caudal medial visual cortex ba 17 18                     lh_Left_Cauda…
#>  2 left  lateral visual cortex ba 37 19 18                        lh_Left_Later…
#>  3 left  superior visual cortex ba 19 39                          lh_Left_Super…
#>  4 left  cuneus ba 18 19                                          lh_Left_Cuneu…
#>  5 left  rostral medial visual cortex ba 18 19                    lh_Left_Rostr…
#>  6 left  medial inferior temporal cortex ba 36 37 20              lh_Left_Media…
#>  7 left  rostral inferior temporal cortex ba 20                   lh_Left_Rostr…
#>  8 left  caudal middle temporal cortex ba 21 22 39                lh_Left_Cauda…
#>  9 left  caudal superior temporal cortex ba 22 41 42              lh_Left_Cauda…
#> 10 left  rostral superior temporal cortex ba 21 22 38             lh_Left_Rostr…
#> 11 left  rostral middle temporal cortex ba 20 21 38               lh_Left_Rostr…
#> 12 left  isthmus cingulate cortex ba 30                           lh_Left_Isthm…
#> 13 left  ventral inferior parietal cortex ba 40                   lh_Left_Ventr…
#> 14 left  dorsal inferior parietal cortex ba 39 40 7               lh_Left_Dorsa…
#> 15 left  superior parietal cortex ba 7                            lh_Left_Super…
#> 16 left  medial superior parietal cortex ba 7                     lh_Left_Media…
#> 17 left  medial parietal cortex ba 31                             lh_Left_Media…
#> 18 left  posterior cingulate cortex ba 23                         lh_Left_Poste…
#> 19 left  ventral somatosensory cortex ba 1 2 3                    lh_Left_Ventr…
#> 20 left  dorsolateral somatosensory cortex ba 1 2 3               lh_Left_Dorso…
#> 21 left  dorsomedial somatosensory cortex ba 1 2 3 5 31           lh_Left_Dorso…
#> 22 left  ventral motor cortex ba 4 6                              lh_Left_Ventr…
#> 23 left  dorsolateral motor cortex ba 4                           lh_Left_Dorso…
#> 24 left  dorsomedial motor cortex ba 4                            lh_Left_Dorso…
#> 25 left  rostral ventral premotor cortex ba 44 45                 lh_Left_Rostr…
#> 26 left  dorsolateral premotor cortex ba 6 8                      lh_Left_Dorso…
#> 27 left  dorsomedial premotor cortex ba 6                         lh_Left_Dorso…
#> 28 left  caudal dorsolateral prefrontal cortex ba 45 46 9         lh_Left_Cauda…
#> 29 left  caudal dorsomedial prefrontal cortex ba 6 8              lh_Left_Cauda…
#> 30 left  mid cingulate cortex ba 24                               lh_Left_Mid_C…
#> 31 left  rostral ventrolateral prefrontal cortex ba 47 45         lh_Left_Rostr…
#> 32 left  rostral dorsolateral inferior prefrontal cortex ba 10 46 lh_Left_Rostr…
#> 33 left  rostral dorsolateral superior prefrontal cortex ba 10 9  lh_Left_Rostr…
#> 34 left  rostral dorsal prefrontal cortex ba 10 9 8               lh_Left_Rostr…
#> 35 left  rostral medial prefrontal cortex ba 9 8                  lh_Left_Rostr…
#> 36 left  ventrolateral orbito frontal cortex ba 11 47             lh_Left_Ventr…
#> 37 left  ventral orbito frontal cortex ba 11 47                   lh_Left_Ventr…
#> 38 left  ventromedial orbito frontal cortex ba 10 11              lh_Left_Ventr…
#> 39 left  ventromedial prefrontal cortex ba 32 10 11               lh_Left_Ventr…
#> 40 left  anterior cingulate cortex ba 24 32                       lh_Left_Anter…
#> 41 left  insular cortex ba 13                                     lh_Left_Insul…
#> 42 left  thalamus                                                 lh_Left_Thala…
#> 43 left  hippocampus                                              lh_Left_Hippo…
#> 44 right cuneus ba 18 19                                          rh_Left_Cuneu…
#> 45 right caudal medial visual cortex ba 17 18                     rh_Right_Caud…
#> 46 right lateral visual cortex ba 37 19 18                        rh_Right_Late…
#> 47 right superior visual cortex ba 19 39                          rh_Right_Supe…
#> 48 right cuneus ba 18 19                                          rh_Right_Cune…
#> 49 right rostral medial visual cortex ba 18 19                    rh_Right_Rost…
#> 50 right medial inferior temporal cortex ba 36 37 20              rh_Right_Medi…
#> 51 right rostral inferior temporal cortex ba 20                   rh_Right_Rost…
#> 52 right caudal middle temporal cortex ba 21 22 39                rh_Right_Caud…
#> 53 right caudal superior temporal cortex ba 22 41 42              rh_Right_Caud…
#> 54 right rostral superior temporal cortex ba 21 22 38             rh_Right_Rost…
#> 55 right rostral middle temporal cortex ba 20 21 38               rh_Right_Rost…
#> 56 right isthmus cingulate cortex ba 30                           rh_Right_Isth…
#> 57 right ventral inferior parietal cortex ba 40                   rh_Right_Vent…
#> 58 right dorsal inferior parietal cortex ba 39 40 7               rh_Right_Dors…
#> 59 right superior parietal cortex ba 7                            rh_Right_Supe…
#> 60 right medial superior parietal cortex ba 7                     rh_Right_Medi…
#> 61 right medial parietal cortex ba 31                             rh_Right_Medi…
#> 62 right posterior cingulate cortex ba 23                         rh_Right_Post…
#> 63 right ventral somatosensory cortex ba 1 2 3                    rh_Right_Vent…
#> 64 right dorsolateral somatosensory cortex ba 1 2 3               rh_Right_Dors…
#> 65 right dorsomedial somatosensory cortex ba 1 2 3 5 31           rh_Right_Dors…
#> 66 right ventral motor cortex ba 4 6                              rh_Right_Vent…
#> 67 right dorsolateral motor cortex ba 4                           rh_Right_Dors…
#> 68 right dorsomedial motor cortex ba 4                            rh_Right_Dors…
#> 69 right rostral ventral premotor cortex ba 44 45                 rh_Right_Rost…
#> 70 right dorsolateral premotor cortex ba 6 8                      rh_Right_Dors…
#> 71 right dorsomedial premotor cortex ba 6                         rh_Right_Dors…
#> 72 right caudal dorsolateral prefrontal cortex ba 45 46 9         rh_Right_Caud…
#> 73 right caudal dorsomedial prefrontal cortex ba 6 8              rh_Right_Caud…
#> 74 right mid cingulate cortex ba 24                               rh_Right_Mid_…
#> 75 right rostral ventrolateral prefrontal cortex ba 47 45         rh_Right_Rost…
#> 76 right rostral dorsolateral inferior prefrontal cortex ba 10 46 rh_Right_Rost…
#> 77 right rostral dorsolateral superior prefrontal cortex ba 10 9  rh_Right_Rost…
#> 78 right rostral dorsal prefrontal cortex ba 10 9 8               rh_Right_Rost…
#> 79 right rostral medial prefrontal cortex ba 9 8                  rh_Right_Rost…
#> 80 right ventrolateral orbito frontal cortex ba 11 47             rh_Right_Vent…
#> 81 right ventral orbito frontal cortex ba 11 47                   rh_Right_Vent…
#> 82 right ventromedial orbito frontal cortex ba 10 11              rh_Right_Vent…
#> 83 right ventromedial prefrontal cortex ba 32 10 11               rh_Right_Vent…
#> 84 right anterior cingulate cortex ba 24 32                       rh_Right_Ante…
#> 85 right insular cortex ba 13                                     rh_Right_Insu…
#> 86 right thalamus                                                 rh_Right_Thal…
#> 87 right hippocampus                                              rh_Right_Hipp…
